https://www.bierhausnyc.com/.title: Bierhaus NYC - German Restaurant & Biergarten
content: Now Available on Game Days : $115 per person 4-hour unlimited 0.5L beers + platters of pretzels, wings, wurst, & more for 4+ people *Ask us for more details*

Bierhaus NYC is brought to you through the love of Oktoberfest & Hofbräu bier. We are a Bavarian-style beer hall located just two blocks from Grand Central, serving authentic German cuisine and bier by the boot since 2011! Live music and steins of crisp Hofbräu bier will transport you to the tents of Oktoberfest in Munich, if only for a few hours.
(646) 874-9498info@bierhausnyc.com
712 Third Avenueat 45th StreetNew York, NY 10017
*Kitchen closes 1 hour earlier*

To make a reservation you can use the Yelp Reservations button above, call us at (646) 874-9498 or email us at reservations@bierhausnyc.com and please include: your name, phone number, number of guests in your party and which date and time you would like to make the reservation for. Thank you!

https://www.bierhausnyc.com/menu.title: Bierhaus NYC - German Restaurant & Biergarten-Menu
content: Now Available on Game Days : $115 per person 4-hour unlimited 0.5L beers + platters of pretzels, wings, wurst, & more for 4+ people *Ask us for more details*
(A CREDIT CARD IS REQUIRED TO OPEN A TAB)
Gluehwein $14
Red Wine, spices, sugar, lemon, orange, rum.
Seared Chicken  $24
Pan seared chicken, served with mashed potatoes, green beans, almonds, Dunkel beer sauce.
Pumpkin Fest $15
Our new cocktail made with Wild Turkey Bourbon, Cinnamon schnapps, Pumpkin Syrup and Apple juice
Classic Chicken Schnitzel $18
Sunnyside egg on top, Haus salad, sauce Gribiche on the side.
Steak Sandwich $24
NY Strip Steak on ciabatta bread, garlic mayo, German Swiss cheese, caramelized onions, herb sauce, baby arugula, balsamic reduction served with truffle parmesan fries.
Haus Dog $14
Our 10 inch Haus Dog, Knack Wurst, sauerkraut, mustard, bacon, five cheeses and a side of chips.
Reuben Sandwich $19
Half a pound of smoked pastrami, sauerkraut, Swiss cheese and Bavarian sweet & spicy mustard served on rye bread
Curry Wurst  $12
Roasted Bratwurst and fries served with our Hausmade Curry sauce.
Steak Frites $28
Hanger Steak, served with Fries and Peppercorn sauce.
Crispy Pork Knuckle $29
Sauerkraut, pickled onions, demi glaze (GF)
Soup of the day  $13
NOTE: Please ask your server for the Soup Special.
Goulash $20
Savory braised beef stew with caraway seed, paprika and beef stock served over egg noodles. Decorated with parsley and sour cream.
BBQ Baby Ribs $22
One pound of Baby Pork Ribs seasoned with spices and BBQ glaze, served with a side of fries and coleslaw.
Grapefruit Hefe Weizen $10
Grapefruit juice, splash of Grenadine and our Weissbeer
Slider Platter
Two of each: Beef Sliders, Pulled Pork Sliders, and Buffalo Chicken Sliders.
Haus Veggie Burger $16
Veggie burger topped with Emmentaler, avocado, mushrooms, caramelized onions, romaine lettuce, tomato and herb mayo. Served with a side of fries. (Vegetarian)
Haus Chicken Wings
Your choice of Spicy Buffalo or Jäger BBQ. Eight pieces. Served with bleu cheese dressing. (GF)
Bierhaus Pretzel
Large 10oz soft dough pretzel imported from Bavaria, served with Biercheese Dip and mustard. (Vegetarian)
Medium size (5oz) soft dough pretzel $7
Add Nutella or Obatzda +$2
Biercheese Dip & Chips  $13
Our popular cheese dip served with home made potato chips. (Vegetarian)
Schnitzel Fingers
Six breaded and fried chicken strip cutlets with homemade spicy mayo.
Käsespätzle  $12
German "mac & cheese". Spätzle with melted cheese and caramelized onions. (Vegetarian)
Add Bacon +$3
Frikadellen
Six German meatballs made out of beef and pork, served with jäger sauce.
Brussel Sprouts
Fried brussel sprouts, apple cider reduction, thyme leaves, hazelnuts and apple slices. (GF, Vegan)
Kale Caesar Salad
Baby kale, shaved parmesan, our homemade croutons and homemade caesar dressing. Shown here with Salmon add-on. (Salad by itself is Vegetarian)
Add: Grilled / Fried Chicken +$6
Salmon +$12
Avocado +$3
Flammkuchen with Bacon  $14
German flatbread with mascarpone, Emmental cheese, caramelized onion, and bacon.
Pickle Fries  $12
Beer Tempura pickles served with spicy mayo (Vegetarian)
Buffalo Cauliflower $13
Vegetarian “buffalo wings”. Buffalo-marinated roasted cauliflower. (GF, Vegetarian, Vegan if you exclude dressing)
Mushroom Flammkuchen $15
German flatbread with five cheeses, cremini mushroom, truffle pealing, shaved parmesan and arugula.(Vegetarian)
Pretzel Party Platter

Serves around 3-5 people. A big mix of our most popular appetizers! Includes: Large Pretzel, Biercheese Dip & Chips, Schnitzel Fingers, Frikadellen, Bratwurst, Käsekrainer, Haus Spicy Sausage, Jumbo Tater Tots, Obatzda, mustard, and ketchup.
Add German cold Potato Salad, Red Cabbage & Sauerkraut +$10
Wurst Sampler Platter
Serves 2-3 people. Wursts included: Bratwurst, Chicken Bratwurst, Cheddar Bratwurst, Andouille, Knackwurst. Served with potato salad, red cabbage, sauerkraut and mustard. (GF)
Add Curry Sauce +$3
Wurst
All Wursts served with German cold potato salad, sauerkraut and mustard. (GF)
Bratwurst  $14(Pork and Veal) - Roasted
Chicken Bratwurst  $14(Chicken and Pork) - Grilled
Haus Spicy Sausage  $14(Pork) - Grilled
Käsekrainer $15(Pork, Beef and Cheese) - Roasted
Classic schnitzel
Breaded pork filet, fried and served with German cold potato salad, red cabbage, and cucumber salad.
Jägerschnitzel
Breaded pork filet, fried, and topped with our homemade Jäger sauce. Served with German cold potato salad, red cabbage and cucumber salad.
Pork Shank $39
Braised pork shank served with demi-glaze, red cabbage, home made spätzle, and crispy onions.
Bierhaus Burger
8 oz. grilled chuck beef topped with caramelized onions, bacon, lettuce, tomato, garlic aioli, and emmentaler cheese (German swiss). Served with fries.
Add avocado +$3 or mushrooms +$2
Chicken Sandwich
Your choice of Grilled or Fried chicken breast topped with melted swiss, bacon, lettuce, tomato and herbed mayonnaise. Served with fries.
Pulled Pork Sandwich $16
Pulled pork on a pretzel bun with coleslaw and pickles. Served with fries.
Beef Sliders $16
3 sliders with bacon, garlic aioli, tomato, pickles, and cheddar cheese.
Buffalo Chicken Sliders
3 sliders with buffalo chicken and blue cheese dressing.
Sauerkraut $6 (Vegetarian)
Red cabbage $6
Cucumber salad $6 (vegan)
German potato salad $6
Haus salad $6 (vegan)
Fries $8
Spätzle $7 (vegetarian) add Jager Sauce +$3
Apple wood smoked bacon $6
Chocolate Lava Cake  $12
Served with a scoop of vanilla ice cream.
Apple Tartlet  $12
Served with a scoop of vanilla ice cream.
Vanilla Ice Cream
2 scoops of vanilla ice cream.
Sundae $12
Three scoops of vanilla ice cream, brownie, whipped cream, chocolate sauce and cherry on top.
For ages 0-12 years. Includes choice of water, sparkling water, apple juice, or 1% milk.
Kinder Mac & Cheese  $7
German spätzle noodles with gruyere cheese and emmental swiss chesse.
Kinder Mini Sliders  $7
Two mini beef sliders on brioche bun with cheddar, mayo, pickle and tomato, served with a side of fries and ketchup.
Kinder Pizza  $7
German flatbread with tomato sauce, cheese and fresh basil.
Kinder Chicken Fingers $7
5 breaded and fried chicken strip cutlets served with a homemade mild mayo dip.
Kinder Sundae  $6
Three small scoops of vanilla ice cream topped with whipped cream, chocolate sauce, jam and rainbow sprinkles.
Breakfast Burger
8 oz. Prime Beef burger with caramelized onions, bacon, obatzda and topped with one sunny side up egg. Served with seasoned fries.
Eggs Royale
Smoked salmon, poached eggs, and hollandaise served on an english muffin, with a side of mixed greens.
Bierhaus Omelette
Egg omelette served with Biercheese, sauerkraut, Jäger-sauce and side of home fries. (GF)
Mimosa or Bellini  $12
A glass of Mimosa (sparkling wine with orange juice) or Bellini (sparkling wine with peach purée)
Mimosa Tower $45, $55
Sparkling wine, orange juice and ice
Chicken and Waffles  $23
Our Haus Waffles served with crispy fried chicken, whipped cream and maple syrup.
Steak & Eggs  $28
Hanger Steak, any style eggs and home fries.

content: Now Available on Game Days : $115 per person 4-hour unlimited 0.5L beers + platters of pretzels, wings, wurst, & more for 4+ people *Ask us for more details*
Presented by NYC Trivia League
Join us for trivia every Monday night at 7pm! Prizes for 1st, 2nd, and 3rd place 🏅
Enjoy our SUPER DEAL for the game - $115pp for 4 hours of unlimited 0.5L beers, wine, well drinks, and platters of pretzels, wings, wurst, & more! For groups of 4+
Valid all day on 1/20/23. One free cheese dip per table.

Celebrate New Year's Eve 2023 at Bierhaus NYC! We'll have the ball drop on our TVs, a sparkling wine toast at midnight, and party favors! Plus, an open bar option for $120 per person (tax + tip included).
$120 open bar package includes:
Hofbräu beer, wine, and well drinks
Biercheese dip & chips, pretzels, and wings
Minimum party size of 4 people required. Entire party must participate in open bar.
Open bar from 10pm-1am only. M﻿ust be 21+ to attend. Limited tickets will be sold at the door. T﻿ax + tip + applicable fees included.
Buy tickets here!

Between 1-3 PM kids can enjoy coloring, games, face paint and fun with Santa! Kids 10 and under eat for FREE from the kids menu and will receive a Christmas gift from Santa! (With the purchase of an adult entree.

Between 1-3 PM kids can enjoy coloring, games, face paint and fun with Santa! Kids 10 and under eat for FREE from the kids menu and will receive a Christmas gift from Santa! (With the purchase of an adult entree.

Join us for our 8th annual Ugly Sweater Contest - make sure to wear your ugliest holiday sweater! Santa Claus himself will be at the haus to judge the competition, first place will take home $100 cash prize! Live music, traditional German winter drink specials, and more! Jägermeister will be joining us between 6-8 PM to give out free jäger-shots
All times are in Eastern Time

1st place - $50 gift card

NYC Restaurant Week Summer 2022  Bierhaus lunch menu
NYC Restaurant Week Summer 2022 Bierhaus Dinner Menu
Celebrate National Beer Day with Buy one, get one free for all draft beers!
Join the St. Patrick’s Day party at our haus! Food specials, quality beer, shotskis, and live music all day!
March Madness 2022 is almost here! Catch all the action on our 10 big screens!
Selection Sunday happening this weekend 3/13. Every NCAA men’s and women’s game will be shown starting 3/17
Burn your ex, get a free liter of beer!🔥
Bring a picture of your ex, or just write their name on our flash paper, we'll burn it, and you get a free liter of hofbrau lager!
Monday-Friday,  Lunch 12:00-5:00pm - Dinner 5:00pm-Closing
Tax and Gratuity not included. Monday -Friday only.

Ring in the New Year at Bierhaus NYC! Watch the ball drop on our giant screen. We will be offering an open bar package for $80 that includes unlimited Hofbräu Beer, Wine, Well Drinks, Pretzels, Haus Wings and Biercheese Dip & Chips, for 3 hours. And a champagne toast!

10pm-1am. Champagne toast at midnight. Live music & complimentary NYE party favorits (hats, horns, etc)*Open Bar package is optional, a la carte menu is also available. If guests choose to do the Open Bar Package, the full party has to do it.
Make a reservation today!
Bring the whole family to brunch with Old Saint Nick!
Kids 10 and under eat for FREE from the kids menu and will receive a Christmas gift from Santa! (With the purchase of an adult entree.)
- Sunday, Dec 5th- Sunday, Dec 12th
Between 1-3 PM kids can enjoy coloring, games, and fun with Santa!
And the fun is not just for the kids - adults can enjoy our great brunch specials! Get an included mimosa, bellini, or half liter Hofbräu Beer with any of our brunch entrees ($19.95).
Make sure to make a reservation and mention how many kids you are bringing: http://www.bierhausnyc.com/reservations

Join us for our 7th annual Ugly Sweater Contest - make sure to wear your ugliest holiday sweater! Santa Claus himself will be at the haus to judge the competition, first place will take home $100 cash!
Live music, traditional German winter drink specials, and more! Jägermeister will be joining us between 6-8 PM to give out free jäger-shots.
NO cover fee, FREE admission!!
Reserve a table at: http://www.bierhausnyc.com/reservations
Bring the whole family to brunch with Old Saint Nick!
Kids 10 and under eat for FREE from the kids menu and will receive a Christmas gift from Santa! (With the purchase of an adult entree.)
- Sunday, Dec 5th- Sunday, Dec 12th
Between 1-3 PM kids can enjoy coloring, games, and fun with Santa!
And the fun is not just for the kids - adults can enjoy our great brunch specials! Get an included mimosa, bellini, or half liter Hofbräu Beer with any of our brunch entrees ($19.95).
Make sure to make a reservation and mention how many kids you are bringing: http://www.bierhausnyc.com/reservations

Thursday Nov 11th is Veterans Day and to honor those who have served our country we are giving out one FREE 1-Liter Hofbräu Beer + a 20% military discount on the rest of your bill, to all veterans with a military ID.
This offer is redeemable all day on Veterans Day, 11/11/2021, just show your server your military ID when ordering!
Make a reservation at:https://www.bierhausnyc.com/reservations

Are you running the NYC Marathon this year? And do you like beer? Then we've got some good news for you! On Sunday Nov 7th, the day of the marathon, we are giving a FREE 1-Liter Hofbräu Beer to runners of the NYC Marathon!
To redeem your complimentary beer, show your server this event! You have to be wearing your official 2021 NYC Marathon race number bib.
Make a reservation at:https://www.bierhausnyc.com/reservations
For more info and to sign up go to: www.bierhausnyc.com/masskrugstemmen
Celebrate our 5th anniversary at Bierhaus & Okto-Burlesque... one night only with:
* JAZZ HAUS ALL-STARS led by The Hot Toddies Jazz Band; featuring Adrian "Prof." Cunningham, Hannah Gill, Cait Jones, and more! (3 sets / 6:45-10pm)

* DJ ANDRIUS* classic burlesque by PEARLS DAILY at 7:25pm, EMILY SHEPHARD at 8:40pm, MIA "The MVP" (formerly Delysia Lachatte) at 9:30pm* Beginner swing dance lesson by JAIME SHANNON at 7:30pm* musicians please sit-in!
-- plus --* exzellent German food n' drinks* No Cover / All ages / 21+ to Drink* must show proof of vaccination for entry!
Join us to celebrate the end of Oktoberfest with "Okto-burlesque", and the fifth anniversary of our weekly events at the beloved Bierhaus - one night only!!

Pre-pandemic we were at Bierhaus every Monday year round in the vibrant, hedonistic Weimar era tradition with our weekly ‘Tanz Kabarett’ featuring gotham’s best Hot Jazz n' Swing bands!! Plus swing DJ's, classic burlesque, and free dance lessons… und exzellent German drink specials, just 2 blocks from Grand Central... and NO COVER!!
Dancers... stone floor, bring appropriate shoes!--------------------------------------------------------Presented by Prohibition Productions and Hofbräu Bierhaus NYC
KIDTOBERFEST — Celebrate Oktoberfest with the whole family!
Every Sunday between 1-3 pm, from Sep 19th - Oct 17th, kids can enjoy coloring, temporary tattoos, oversized games and live accordion music — and kids 10 & under eat FREE off the kids menu!
And the fun is not just for the kids - adults can enjoy our great brunch specials! Get a brunch entree of your choice plus a Mimosa, Bellini, or half liter Hofbräu Beer, for $19.95!
Brunch is served between 12-5 PM on Sundays. View there brunch menu here.Make a reservation (and please include in notes how many kids you are bringing!):bierhausnyc.com/reservations

Live music, traditional German winter drink specials, and more! Jägermeister will be joining us between 6-8 PM to give out free jäger-shots.
NO cover fee, FREE admission!!
Reserve a table at: http://www.bierhausnyc.com/reservations
Bring the whole family to brunch with Old Saint Nick!
Kids 10 and under eat for FREE from the kids menu and will receive a Christmas gift from Santa! (With the purchase of an adult entree.)
- Sunday, Dec 5th- Sunday, Dec 12th
Between 1-3 PM kids can enjoy coloring, games, and fun with Santa!
And the fun is not just for the kids - adults can enjoy our great brunch specials! Get an included mimosa, bellini, or half liter Hofbräu Beer with any of our brunch entrees ($19.95).
Make sure to make a reservation and mention how many kids you are bringing: http://www.bierhausnyc.com/reservations

Thursday Nov 11th is Veterans Day and to honor those who have served our country we are giving out one FREE 1-Liter Hofbräu Beer + a 20% military discount on the rest of your bill, to all veterans with a military ID.
This offer is redeemable all day on Veterans Day, 11/11/2021, just show your server your military ID when ordering!
Make a reservation at:https://www.bierhausnyc.com/reservations

Are you running the NYC Marathon this year? And do you like beer? Then we've got some good news for you! On Sunday Nov 7th, the day of the marathon, we are giving a FREE 1-Liter Hofbräu Beer to runners of the NYC Marathon!
To redeem your complimentary beer, show your server this event! You have to be wearing your official 2021 NYC Marathon race number bib.
Make a reservation at:https://www.bierhausnyc.com/reservations
For more info and to sign up go to: www.bierhausnyc.com/masskrugstemmen
Celebrate our 5th anniversary at Bierhaus & Okto-Burlesque... one night only with:
* JAZZ HAUS ALL-STARS led by The Hot Toddies Jazz Band; featuring Adrian "Prof." Cunningham, Hannah Gill, Cait Jones, and more! (3 sets / 6:45-10pm)

* DJ ANDRIUS* classic burlesque by PEARLS DAILY at 7:25pm, EMILY SHEPHARD at 8:40pm, MIA "The MVP" (formerly Delysia Lachatte) at 9:30pm* Beginner swing dance lesson by JAIME SHANNON at 7:30pm* musicians please sit-in!
-- plus --* exzellent German food n' drinks* No Cover / All ages / 21+ to Drink* must show proof of vaccination for entry!
Join us to celebrate the end of Oktoberfest with "Okto-burlesque", and the fifth anniversary of our weekly events at the beloved Bierhaus - one night only!!

Pre-pandemic we were at Bierhaus every Monday year round in the vibrant, hedonistic Weimar era tradition with our weekly ‘Tanz Kabarett’ featuring gotham’s best Hot Jazz n' Swing bands!! Plus swing DJ's, classic burlesque, and free dance lessons… und exzellent German drink specials, just 2 blocks from Grand Central... and NO COVER!!
Dancers... stone floor, bring appropriate shoes!--------------------------------------------------------Presented by Prohibition Productions and Hofbräu Bierhaus NYC
KIDTOBERFEST — Celebrate Oktoberfest with the whole family!
Every Sunday between 1-3 pm, from Sep 19th - Oct 17th, kids can enjoy coloring, temporary tattoos, oversized games and live accordion music — and kids 10 & under eat FREE off the kids menu!
And the fun is not just for the kids - adults can enjoy our great brunch specials! Get a brunch entree of your choice plus a Mimosa, Bellini, or half liter Hofbräu Beer, for $19.95!
Brunch is served between 12-5 PM on Sundays. View there brunch menu here.Make a reservation (and please include in notes how many kids you are bringing!):bierhausnyc.com/reservations
